response_templates.high_urgency_positive: Thank you for your urgent inquiry. We prioritize your request and will contact you immediately. We're excited to learn more about your needs.
response_templates.medium_urgency_positive: Thank you for your inquiry. We will respond promptly within 24 hours. We appreciate your interest.
response_templates.low_urgency_positive: Thank you for reaching out. We appreciate your interest and will respond shortly.
response_templates.negative_sentiment: Thank you for your inquiry. We're committed to addressing your concerns and will contact you soon.
